TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Su_nun_sung, title = Su_nun_sung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Su_nun_sung} }

S.FORM: alang Su nun sung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 341 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 85%, Amis 7%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Su nun sung hya' ga Buklavu. tay mkyahu' na Su nun sung hya' ga Talunas. tay 'llaw na Su nun sung hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Su nun sung ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Su nun sung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 341 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 85%, Amis 7%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Su nun sung hya' ga Buklavu. tay mkyahu' na Su nun sung hya' ga Talunas. tay 'llaw na Su nun sung hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Su nun sung ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤ukla*u. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč ńßja Ē …£a talunas~…ē. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč ńßja Ē …£a kaminu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
